title: Revert "write_xaiger: only instantiate each whitebox cell type once"

features.name: sequential logic with part-select on register output
features.description: Code should include a sequential module with a register that feeds a part-select operation, where the register is updated via non-blocking assignment in a clocked always block and the part-selected bits are used in a continuous assignment with negation

features.name: ecp5 synthesis with abc9 optimization
features.description: Code should include a sequential design with registers that is processed through ecp5 synthesis with abc9 optimization and equivalence checking, where the optimization incorrectly modifies the sequential behavior
features.snippet: module led_blink (input clk, output ledc); reg [6:0] led_counter = 0; always @( posedge clk ) led_counter <= led_counter + 1; assign ledc = !led_counter[ 6:3 ]; endmodule
